name: TMAC Resources Inc.
description: TMAC Resources Inc. was a Canada-based gold mining company focused on the exploration, evaluation, and development of mineral properties. The company primarily operated the Hope Bay Project, located in the Kitikmeot Region of Nunavut, Canada. TMAC Resources was incorporated in 2012 and headquartered in Toronto, Ontario. The company was dedicated to the responsible development of its gold assets until it was acquired by Agnico Eagle Mines Limited in 2021, marking the end of its status as an independent publicly traded entity on the Toronto Stock Exchange.
